notes: Current pipeline baseline on PDB 5nrl dataset at grid=128. Replaces old pipeline (911604e) baseline which used non-deterministic column selection and had half-image covariance bugs. PCS metrics are lower than old pipeline due to deterministic seeding of randomized_column_choice and removal of half-image path, but other metrics (FSC, embedding, contrasts, noise) are comparable or better.
volumes_source: 5nrl spliceosome, 50 volumes, grid=128, voxel=4.25A, B=80, rot=10deg, path_symmetric
